subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! From the Friend seek naught but the Friend Himself, and from the Beloved desire nothing save His good-pleasure. His bounties exceed a hundred thousand-fold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله از دوست غیر دوست مخواه و از محبوب جز رضایش مطلب عنایتش از صد هزار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @attaining good pleasure of God, @love of God, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
